Name: PPG Performance Suite
Author: BeamngDriveAddict
Description: Makes the game run smoother during big builds and heavy combat without changing how anything looks or plays. Fixes tracers/bullet effects disappearing during heavy fire, auto-cleans piles of debris and blood/scorch marks so they don't tank your FPS over long sessions, and makes bullets only do expensive collision checks when something's actually nearby. Damage, range, and speed are untouched. Note: disabling in the menu takes effect after a full game restart (PPG limitation, not this mod).
